title: Kanban View doesn't trigger Notifications
excerpt: If people are assigned from the kanban view creation card, the notifications do not reach the assigned people. Clearly this is impractical, is there any way to solve this?

posts.author: JoseV (Jose )
posts.cookedHtml:
If people are assigned from the kanban view creation card, the notifications do not reach the assigned people. Clearly this is impractical, is there any way to solve this?
